  • Method Details

    • actor

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder actor(String actor)
      The user or service that triggered the state update.

    • actor

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder actor(Optional<String> actor)
      The user or service that triggered the state update.

    • message

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder message(String message)
      Additional description of the transfer state.

    • message

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder message(Optional<String> message)
      Additional description of the transfer state.

    • metadata

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder metadata(Map<String,Object> metadata)
      Additional metadata relating to the transfer state. Included data depends on the state, e.g.: - Rejection reasons are included when the `state` is `REJECTED` - Reason and comment are included when `state` is `CANCELED`

    • metadata

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder metadata(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends Map<String,Object>> metadata)
      Additional metadata relating to the transfer state. Included data depends on the state, e.g.: - Rejection reasons are included when the `state` is `REJECTED` - Reason and comment are included when `state` is `CANCELED`

    • state

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder state(IctWithdrawalTransferStateState state)
      The high level state of a transfer, one of: - `PROCESSING` - The transfer is being processed and will be posted if successful. - `PENDING_REVIEW` - The transfer is pending review and will continue processing if approved. - `POSTED` - The transfer has been posted to the ledger and will be completed at the end of the processing window if not canceled first. - `COMPLETED` - The transfer has been batched and completed. - `REJECTED` - The transfer was rejected. - `CANCELED` - The transfer was canceled. - `RETURNED` - The transfer was returned. - `POSTPONED` - The transfer is postponed and will resume processing during the next processing window.

    • state

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder state(Optional<? extends IctWithdrawalTransferStateState> state)
      The high level state of a transfer, one of: - `PROCESSING` - The transfer is being processed and will be posted if successful. - `PENDING_REVIEW` - The transfer is pending review and will continue processing if approved. - `POSTED` - The transfer has been posted to the ledger and will be completed at the end of the processing window if not canceled first. - `COMPLETED` - The transfer has been batched and completed. - `REJECTED` - The transfer was rejected. - `CANCELED` - The transfer was canceled. - `RETURNED` - The transfer was returned. - `POSTPONED` - The transfer is postponed and will resume processing during the next processing window.

    • updateTime

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder updateTime(OffsetDateTime updateTime)
      The time of the state update.

    • updateTime

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState.Builder updateTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> updateTime)
      The time of the state update.

    • build

      public IctWithdrawalTransferState build()
